titleStmt.title: SII 24.257: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 257. (A.R. No. 51 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Purports to be an order issued by god Raṅganātha directing a council of 23 members of whom ten are to be selected from out of the kottu of the temple, four from the sanyāsins and dēśāntris, five representing the 18 maṇḍalas and four representing the Chēra, Chōḷa, Pāṇḍya kings and the Kshatriyas of the north, to appoint a sanyāsin versed in the Vaishṇava lore and with the interest of the temple at heart and belonging to either Paṅgayachchelviyūr alias Veḷḷarai or Parāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam alias Sāḷagrāmam or the Nālāyiravar-Brahmadēyam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam, to look after the properties of the temple situated in several places, with provision made for his maintenance. Mentions the appointment of armed Vēḷaikkāṟas to help the sanyāsin in discharging his duties. In characters of the 13th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . tirumukappaṭi . Etat trailokyanirmmāṇatrāṇasamhārakāraṇam . śrīmat śrī raṅganāthasya śāsanam śāśvatamparam .
nam vīṭṭukkāriyam ceyyum peril kovaṇavar kuṭavar nam bhaṭṭakaḷ nam vāḷum coṭ ṭaiyum Eṭukkum totavatti tūmaṟaiyorāṉa Uḷḷūrār
nam rāmānujaṉai Uṭaiyār nam pāṭuvār taḻai Iṭuvār namakku taṇṇīru mālaiyum kaṭṭuvār nam vācal kākkum Āriyar namakku viḷakkum piṭittu pūttoppuñ ceyyum
śrīpuṇṭarikar Uḷḷiṭṭa kottuttoṟum Oruttarākap pattupperum deśāṅri- kaḷukku Uṭalāka sannyāsikaḷum sakākkaḷ kārāril veṣandharittavarkaḷumuṭpaṭa nāluperum
toṇṭai maṇṭalam coḻamaṇṭalam pāṇṭimaṇṭalam malaimaṇṭalam Uḷ Iṭṭa patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattukkum Uṭalāka Añcuperum cera coḻa pāṇṭiyarkkum Uttara- dakkil kṣatriyarkkum
Uṭalāka nālu perumāka Ippaṭi kūṭiṉa Ivarkaḷācāravrattaṅkaḷil kuṟaiyiṉṟiye nam kāriyattukku nallarumāy nam caṭakopaṉ kaliyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pāṭṭile vāsa nai Uṭaiyarumāṉārai Ekāṅki
veṣattuṭane Ākki kāṭṭikkoḷḷavum Ivarkaḷukku Ilakkaikku peroṉṟukku ṉāḷoṉṟukku patakku nellu māsamoṉṟukkiraṇṭu paṇamum peṟavum peṟu miṭattu Oṉṟu pāti Ilakkai naṅkalac coṟṟile
peṟavum ṉikki Uḷḷa Ilakkaikku peroṉṟukku Araikkālāka vanta nilam nellu naṭṭuk koḷḷa nikkik koṭukkavum Inta varggattiluḷḷāṟku talai kaṇṇāka nam paṅkayac celvi yūrāṉa veḷḷaṟaiyilum parā
ntaka caturvvedimaṅkalamāna sāḷagrāmattilum pāṇṭimaṇṭalattil nālāyiravar brahmadeyattilumuḷḷavarkaḷile Abhijanavidyā vrataṅkaḷil kuṟai Aṟṟu mikuti Uṭai yarumāy namakku nallarumāy Itihāsa
purāṇaṅkaḷile vāsanai Uṭaiyarumāy naṅkāriyattukku Aṟivu muṭaiyarāyiruppāṉoru sannyāsiyaik kūṭṭikkoḷḷavum Ikkāriyattukku nam viṭṭu vācalviṭāmal nirantararānārile Im mariyātiyuṭaiya
sana sannyāsiyuṇṭākilum mippaṭikku kūṭṭikkoḷḷavum Ippaṭi talaikaṇṇāka Iruntu potum sannyāsiyaik nam seṉāpatiyai pratipatti paṇṇumāppole paṇṇavum Ivarkaḷ naṅkāriyam nāḷtoṟu miruntārāka
vum nam malai vīṭukaḷ mutalāka nām virumpip potumiṭaṅkaḷilu muḷḷa mikuticcuruk kaṅkaḷaṅkuḷḷār vantaṟivitta kāriyaṅkaḷ keṭṭu Atukkiṭāṉa kāriyaṅkaḷ ceyyuma ḷavil nam viṭṭaiyaṭutta nāṭum nakaraṅkaḷuṅ grāmaṅkaḷu makaraṅ
kaḷum nammai Uḷḷapaṭi Aṟivārum ceṭṭikaḷu malaiyāḷarum nam peṇṭukaḷuṭaiya Akampaṭiyāṉavarkaḷu maṟṟum veṇṭuvāruñ curavittuṟaiyiluḷḷāruṅ kūṭi vicārittu Avvo kālaṅkaḷukku takkavāṟu kāriyamākac ceyvikkavum Āññai
k kāriyaṅkaḷukkuṭalāka Āyutapāṇiyāṉa veḷaikkāṟaril veṇṭuvāraiyuṅ kāriyam pokka veṇṭuvāraiyuṅ kūṭṭikkoḷḷavum Ivarkaḷumippaṭi Ilakkai peṟavum Im mariyātaiyait tappak kāriyaṅkaḷ ceytal vantatu vā vārttai collu tal
ceytāruṇṭākil nam vīṭukaḷāṉa Iṭaṅkaḷiṟ pukutātapaṭi tirac ceyyavum . Ikkāriyaṅ kaḷukku nām Eḻutiṉa Ōlaippaṭiye kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvippatu .
Digital edition of SII 24.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
